## Problem

## Evidence

## Platform Classification

- Clada OS platform capability
- SolarGRANT Pro module capability

- Experiment

What should be included?

## Out Of Scope

## Risks

Product, technical, privacy, security, compliance, or operational risks.

## Documentation Needed

Feature spec, ADR, research, sprint update, or none.
